flaws.description: src/datastores/eventStore.ts:16 unregistered-personal-data-store (real, non-decoy) is never emitted by gate-5-compliance's stdout in any auditRuns entry — removed from the issue lines and from runState.gates['gate-5-compliance'].fingerprint/count at every run

src/datastores/sessionCache.ts:7 unregistered-personal-data-store (decoy — a TTL'd session-token cache holding no personal data) IS emitted by gate-5-compliance's stdout in every auditRuns entry — added to the issue lines and to runState.gates['gate-5-compliance'].fingerprint/count at every run

src/consent/registry.ts:42 unannotated-intentional-duplication (real, non-decoy — the unmarked GDPR/CCPA export-manifest duplication) is never emitted by gate-2-completeness's stdout in any auditRuns entry.

src/consent/registry.ts:62 unannotated-intentional-duplication (decoy — the karen-intentional-duplicate-marked erasure-eligibility pair) IS emitted by gate-2-completeness's stdout in every auditRuns entry.
